project_common.outline_style: 2px solid outline included in sprite dimensions

context.role: Ground obstacle requiring jump to avoid, wider than small variant
context.screen_position: Spawns at x=650px (screen_width + 50), y=0 (ground level), scrolls left
context.usage_scenario: Medium difficulty obstacle appearing from game start, avoided by jumping, 35% spawn probability

visual_specification.shape: Two desert cacti grouped together, vertical trunks with spikes
visual_specification.texture: pixel art, flat color, no gradients
visual_specification.details: Two cacti side by side, each with visible spikes/thorns, combined silhouette, wider obstacle requiring earlier jump timing, hitbox 65x67px (3px margin for forgiveness)

relationships.shared_with: Same height (70px) as cactus_small, same color and style as all obstacles
relationships.differences_from: cactus_small is 34px wide (1 cactus), cactus_large is 102px wide and 100px tall (3 cacti, taller)

explicit_negations: no animation or movement (position changes only)
no spacing between the two cacti (grouped as single obstacle)
